user.title: Spire Energy
user.description: Connect to your Spire Energy account to import daily gas usage into the Energy dashboard.

data_description.username: The email address you use to log in to myaccount.spireenergy.com
data_description.password: Your Spire Energy online account password
data_description.account_id: Your Spire Energy account number, visible on your account overview page
data_description.sa_id: Your Service Account ID. Not visible in the Spire web UI — find it by opening browser developer tools (F12), going to the Network tab, navigating to your usage history, and looking for a request containing 'daily-usage-history'. The SA ID appears as the 'sald' parameter in the URL.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Spire Energy
reauth_confirm.description: Your Spire Energy credentials are no longer valid. Please re-enter them.

data_description.username: The email address you use to log in to myaccount.spireenergy.com
data_description.password: Your Spire Energy online account password

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials — please check your username and password
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Spire Energy. Check your internet connection and try again.

abort.already_configured: This Spire Energy account is already configured
